mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.unit_id, u.username, u.real_name, su.unit_name, u.tree_path FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = u.unit_id WHERE u.is_deleted = FALSE AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY su.unit_name ASC, u.real_name ASC, u.id ASC

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.unit_id, u.username, u.real_name, su.unit_name, u.tree_path FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = u.unit_id WHERE u.is_deleted = FALSE AND u.status = 1 AND u.tree_path LIKE CONCAT(#{treePathPrefix}, '%') ORDER BY su.unit_name ASC, u.real_name ASC, u.id ASC
